overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit Japanese-inspired cyberpunk city. The player moves from a covered walkway along a canal into a bustling commercial district with wet streets reflecting vibrant neon signs in pink, green, and blue.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal-side walkway transitioning to covered arcade

events.description: moving from open canal area into covered walkway with metal beam structure
entering area illuminated by red paper lanterns hanging from ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking along a concrete canal wall, entering a covered pedestrian walkway with traditional Japanese lanterns overhead

entered.detail: Weathered concrete retaining wall with graffiti alongside a dark waterway
Metal corrugated roof supported by steel I-beams covering the walkway
Traditional Japanese paper lanterns with black calligraphy characters hanging in a row
Tall illuminated building signs with Japanese characters in pink and blue neon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins alongside a dark canal with concrete walls, moving into a covered pedestrian walkway. Traditional red paper lanterns provide warm accent lighting against the cool neon glow from nearby buildings. The environment transitions from open waterfront to sheltered arcade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered shopping arcade with traditional and cyberpunk elements

events.description: slight right turn to follow the curved walkway under the overpass
crowd density increases as entering busier commercial section of the arcade

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered arcade, passing pedestrians and observing shop fronts with neon signage and metal support columns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead in the same direction
pedestrian standing near a shop entrance on the right side

entered.detail: Heavy steel I-beam columns supporting the overhead roof structure
Storefronts with illuminated displays and signage at street level
Elevated pedestrian walkway or building connection spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered arcade lined with metal support pillars and traditional red paper lanterns. The walkway curves gently to the right, passing various shop fronts with neon signage. Pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, and an overhead bridge structure becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with vehicle traffic

events.description: stepping off the covered sidewalk onto the open wet asphalt street
futuristic green car with neon underglow passes by on the left side
entering area with more intense neon billboard lighting reflecting off wet pavement

agents.ego_description: transitioning from sidewalk to the wet asphalt street, walking among traffic while neon lights reflect off the ground

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car with green neon underglow driving past the player
pedestrian in white outfit walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: Rain-slicked black asphalt street reflecting pink, green, and blue neon lights
Red and white striped concrete construction barriers lining the street edge
Large illuminated advertising screens and neon signs mounted on building facades
Cyberpunk-style cars with glowing undercarriage lighting passing by on the road

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered arcade and steps onto the open street. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant neon lights from surrounding buildings. Futuristic vehicles with glowing undercarriages pass by on the left as the player walks down the center of the road, surrounded by towering vertical billboards and shop fronts on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial district with arcades and clinics

events.description: black and white police cruiser drives past on the left side of the street
passing blue arcade machines and game cabinets on the right sidewalk
another futuristic green sports car passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing down the neon-lit commercial street, passing arcade machines and various storefronts while traffic moves past

notable_agents.action: police cruiser with flashing lights driving past on the left
pedestrian in red top and white skirt standing near arcade machines

entered.detail: Blue arcade game cabinets with glowing screens and 'BIG' signage on the sidewalk
Circular purple neon sign for Kiroshi optical clinic with distinctive branding
Tall vertical neon sign with Japanese characters indicating a hotel
Green illuminated directional arrow sign hanging over the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the dense commercial district with wet streets reflecting neon lights. The player passes blue arcade machines on the right sidewalk and walks beneath various overhead signs including a prominent purple Kiroshi clinic sign. Police cruisers and futuristic sports cars drive past on the left, while pedestrians populate the sidewalks near various shop entrances.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a secluded canal walkway into the heart of a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins alongside a dark concrete canal, moving from the open waterfront into a sheltered pedestrian arcade illuminated by traditional red paper lanterns. As the camera curves through the arcade past various shop fronts and pedestrians, the sheltered space gradually opens up as the player steps onto the open street. The scene then shifts to a wide urban corridor where wet asphalt reflects towering vertical billboards and glowing futuristic vehicles pass by on the left. Finally, the movement continues deep into the dense district, passing blue arcade machines and a purple Kiroshi clinic sign while police cruisers navigate the rain-slicked roads.
